name: latex-comment-preview
description: Preview LaTeX math written inside code comments (Python # lines and ''' / """ docstrings). Hover to see rendered math, or move the cursor into a $...$ span for a live inline render.

latexCommentPreview.inlineOnCursor.description: Show a rendered inline preview when the caret or selection is inside a $...$ span.

latexCommentPreview.hover.description: Show a rendered preview when hovering a $...$ span in a comment.

latexCommentPreview.maxRenderLength.description: Skip rendering LaTeX spans longer than this many characters (safety guard).

latexCommentPreview.renderColor.description: CSS color for the inline rendered math (e.g. "#6a9955"). Leave empty to auto-match the editor comment color. Does not affect the hover preview.

latexCommentPreview.useWebviewMeasure.description: TEST: use a background webview to measure exact rendered math width (eliminates the trailing gap). Adds a 'LaTeX Measurer' view to the Explorer sidebar that must be revealed once to initialize.
